name: agent-ping
description: Plays a sound when Claude finishes responding. Works in Cursor, Windsurf, and any Claude Code environment.

agentPing.enabled.description: Enable or disable Agent Ping entirely.

agentPing.useSingleSound.description: Use one sound file for all events instead of per-event sounds.

agentPing.singleSound.description: Path to sound file used for all events when useSingleSound is true. Leave empty to use the bundled default.

agentPing.stopSound.description: Path to sound file played when Claude finishes a task. Leave empty to use the bundled default.

agentPing.notificationSound.description: Path to sound file played when Claude asks a question. Leave empty to use the bundled default.

agentPing.permissionSound.description: Path to sound file played when a permission prompt appears. Leave empty to use the bundled default.

agentPing.questionDetection.description: Use smart question detection on Stop events to play a different sound when Claude is asking you something.

agentPing.stopEnabled.description: Enable or disable the Stop event sound.

agentPing.notificationEnabled.description: Enable or disable the Notification event sound.

agentPing.permissionEnabled.description: Enable or disable the Permission event sound.
